title: Agent Channels
subtitle: Connect messaging platforms so Jarvis can reach you anywhere
howItWorksBody: Each channel runs a lightweight agent on your chosen platform (Discord, Telegram, Slack, etc.). You message the agent from your normal chat app — it relays your messages to Jarvis, who responds, runs workflows, and sends you alerts. All processing stays on your machine.
howItWorksBullet1: Message the agent from your normal chat app
howItWorksBullet3: Responses, alerts, and trade confirmations flow back to you
disconnectDescription: This will stop all message routing for this channel. You can reconnect later.
